generated_oml:
instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A building or infrastructure in the AECO domain demonstrated in a Living Lab case study for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle-encompassing optimization of building operations"
    base:contains RoomTemperatureSensor, AirHumiditySensor, CO2ConcentrationSensor, IlluminanceSensor, HVACActuator, LightingController, WindowBlindActuator
]

instance RoomTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor for real-time environmental monitoring in building operations"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance AirHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor for real-time environmental monitoring in building operations"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2ConcentrationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO2 concentration sensor for real-time environmental monitoring in building operations"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2ConcentrationDataTransmitted
]

instance IlluminanceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Illuminance sensor for real-time environmental monitoring in building operations"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IlluminanceDataTransmitted
]

instance RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RoomTemperatureSensor
]

instance AirHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirHumiditySensor
]

instance CO2ConcentrationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2ConcentrationSensor
]

instance IlluminanceDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IlluminanceSensor
]

instance RoomTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance AirHumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirHumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance CO2ConcentrationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time CO2 concentration data for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2ConcentrationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance IlluminanceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time illuminance data for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IlluminanceDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance BIMModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for BIM modeling and configuration"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for device connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModularExtensionsService, TwinningProcessService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for modeling and configuration"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelingService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides FacilityManagementInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption, visual comfort, and health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, HealthEffectsInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of energy consumption based on predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance VisualComfortOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of visual comfort in building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization using Unreal Engine 5"

]

instance ModularExtensionsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service-oriented modular extensions for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ExtensibilityInsight
]

instance TwinningProcessService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

]

    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization in building operations"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for visual comfort in building operations"
]

instance HealthEffectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for non-visual health effects"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

]

]

    base:desc "Control signals sent from the DT to Building Control Systems (BCS) actuators and controllers for adaptive lighting and operational adjustments, based on predictive analytics and user-centered control strategies."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with physical assets, as specified by 'real-time data exchange' and 'continuous synchronization' for monitoring and control operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular, service-oriented architecture with a central hub facilitating bidirectional data exchange, standardized extension points for integrating custom services, and support for scalable deployment across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle from initial design to refurbishments and adaptations during operation, as supported by BIM's comprehensive representation throughout the building life cycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluation using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric for interoperability and architectural soundness, with attention to semantic drift through synchronization techniques to ensure model integrity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, enabling bidirectional communication between physical assets and digital twins; specific protocols not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [

]
